name: Athlete
summary: You have undergone extensive physical training to gain the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You have undergone extensive physical training to gain the following benefits:

items: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
When you are prone, standing up uses only 5 feet of your movement.
Climbing doesn't cost you extra movement.
You can make a running long jump or a running high jump after moving only 5 feet on foot, rather than 10 feet.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

highlights: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
